name: core.openwop.agents.sales-coach
description: Sales Coach agent. Analyzes call transcripts, identifies coaching moments, recommends next steps, and tracks rep development over time via long-term memory. Pure-agent pack.
author: OpenWOP Working Group

agents.label: Sales Coach Agent
agents.description: Analyzes call transcripts (or call summaries) for coaching moments — talk ratio, discovery quality, objection handling, next-step clarity. Recommends concrete next actions. Tracks per-rep development arc in long-term memory.
